title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIVE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED FIVE, ENTITLED "AN ACT FIXING THE SALARIES OF CERTAIN POSITIONS IN THE VETERANS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL".

chunks.text:
S. No. 417 / 66 OG No. 37, 8531-1 (September 14, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6133, August 31, 1970 ]

AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIVE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED FIVE, ENTITLED "AN ACT FIXING THE SALARIES OF CERTAIN POSITIONS IN THE VETERANS MEMORIAL HOSPITAL".

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval,

Approved, August 31, 1970.
